transition_log.note: claudecli.ts: buildSubprocessEnv returns {env, keychainError?}; catch logs warn+captures error; empty finalResult throws PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR with keychain reason + recovery instruction. anthropic.ts: useClaudeOauth path wrapped in try/catch; keychain failure falls back to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN env vars; throws PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR with recovery instruction only if both absent. logger imported in both providers. All 5 criteria pass, build + tests clean.

session-store.ts: exported estimateTokens() and windowMessages() pure functions (system messages always preserved, newest-to-oldest non-system drop). orchestrator.ts: contextLimit from AGENT_MCP_CONTEXT_LIMIT env; messagesToSend = contextLimit>0 ? window : currentMessages passed to provider.chat. CLAUDE.md: AGENT_MCP_CONTEXT_LIMIT and AGENT_MCP_DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS rows added to env table. All 4 criteria pass, build + tests clean.

CONTEXT_WINDOW_EXCEEDED was pre-declared in errorCodeSchema by provider-error-codes state. orchestrator.ts: context detection block added after rate-limit check — catches code=context_length_exceeded and message includes 'context_length_exceeded'/'prompt is too long'. All 3 criteria pass, build + tests clean.

validation/errors.ts: PROVIDER_TIMEOUT/PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR/PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED/CONTEXT_WINDOW_EXCEEDED added to errorCodeSchema. orchestrator.ts catch block: timeout first (signal.aborted|composedSignal.aborted|AbortError|TimeoutError→PROVIDER_TIMEOUT), then auth (AuthenticationError|401→PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR), then rate-limit (429→PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED), then generic fallback. anthropic.ts: ToolError import added; onFailedAttempt short-circuits 401 with PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR. All 5 criteria pass, 49/49 tests green.

anthropic.ts: cacheReadTokens/cacheCreationTokens forwarded from sdkUsage; maxTokens uses defaultMaxTokens() (which reads AGENT_MCP_DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS env var). schema.ts: cache_read_input_tokens + cache_creation_input_tokens nullable integer columns added. drizzle-kit generated 0003_nifty_shriek.sql. UsagePlugin: cache columns included in INSERT values and UPSERT SET (COALESCE accumulation). All 5 criteria pass, build + 49/49 tests green.
index.ts: MAX_DEPTH→AGENT_MCP_MAX_DEPTH, MAX_TOOL_LOOPS→AGENT_MCP_MAX_TOOL_LOOPS (default 10→50), exported AGENT_MCP_DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS constant (default 8192). All 4 criteria pass. Build clean.

usageSummarySchema gains stopReason?: z.string().optional(). tools/usage.ts: SEVERITY + mostSevereStr() at module level; summarise() fold includes stopReason via mostSevereStr. Both criteria pass. Build clean, 49/49 tests pass.

Added SEVERITY/mostSevere module-level helpers. Accumulator gains mostSevereStopReason/maxTokens. onTaskStart populates both from provider config. onModelResponse updates mostSevereStopReason in-memory then includes stopReason/maxTokens in UPSERT (maxTokens omitted from onConflictDoUpdate SET). All 3 criteria pass. 49/49 tests green.
Added stopReason/maxTokens nullable columns to taskUsageTable in schema.ts. drizzle-kit generated 0002_lumpy_silver_centurion.sql with ALTER TABLE ADD stop_reason/max_tokens. All 4 criteria pass.

openai.ts: STOP_REASON lookup + normalisedStopReason; added stopReason/maxTokens to usage return. anthropic.ts: STOP_REASON lookup mapping end_turn/max_tokens/tool_use; added stopReason/maxTokens to usage return. All 4 criteria pass. Build clean.

Added cacheReadTokens?/cacheCreationTokens? to TokenUsage in domain.ts; added PROVIDER_TIMEOUT/PROVIDER_AUTH_ERROR/PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED to AgentMcpErrorCode in errors.ts; updated barrel TokenUsageExtShape in index.ts. All 8 criteria pass. agent-mcp-types and agent-mcp build clean. Note: unstaged changes to anthropic.ts (OAuth beta header + defaultMaxTokens) and validation/agent.ts (versionedBaseUrlSchema) are included in this commit as they were pre-authored changes on disk.
